feat_bar_rage.name: Rage
feat_bar_rage.description:
In battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging, you gain advantage on Strength checks/saves, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage, and a bonus to damage rolls.

Your rage lasts 1 minute. It ends early if you are knocked unconscious or if your turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile creature since your last turn or taken damage.

feat_bar_unarmored_defense.name: Unarmored Defense
feat_bar_unarmored_defense.description: While you are not wearing any armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

feat_bar_reckless.name: Reckless Attack
feat_bar_reckless.description: When you make your first attack on your turn, you can decide to attack recklessly. Doing so gives you advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using Strength during this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

feat_bar_danger_sense.name: Danger Sense
feat_bar_danger_sense.description: You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that you can see, such as traps and spells, while not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

feat_bar_primal_knowledge.name: Primal Knowledge
feat_bar_primal_knowledge.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice from the barbarian skill list. You gain another at 10th level.

feat_bar_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_bar_asi.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_bar_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_bar_extra_attack.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

feat_bar_fast_movement.name: Fast Movement
feat_bar_fast_movement.description: Your speed increases by 3 meters (10 feet) while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

feat_bar_feral_instinct.name: Feral Instinct
feat_bar_feral_instinct.description: You have advantage on initiative rolls. Additionally, if you are surprised at the beginning of combat and aren't incapacitated, you can act normally if you enter your rage.

feat_bar_instinctive_pounce.name: Instinctive Pounce
feat_bar_instinctive_pounce.description: As part of the bonus action you take to enter your rage, you can move up to half your speed.

feat_bar_brutal_critical.name: Brutal Critical
feat_bar_brutal_critical.description: You can roll additional weapon damage dice when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee attack.

feat_bar_relentless_rage.name: Relentless Rage
feat_bar_relentless_rage.description: If you drop to 0 hit points while raging and don't die outright, you can make a DC 10 Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead. Each time you use this, the DC increases by 5 until a short/long rest.

feat_bar_persistent_rage.name: Persistent Rage
feat_bar_persistent_rage.description: Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or if you choose to end it.

feat_bar_indomitable_might.name: Indomitable Might
feat_bar_indomitable_might.description: If your total for a Strength check is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total.

feat_bar_primal_champion.name: Primal Champion
feat_bar_primal_champion.description: Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4. Your maximum for those scores is now 24.

feat_anc_protectors.name: Ancestral Protectors
feat_anc_protectors.description: While raging, the first creature you hit with an attack on your turn has disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you, and allies have resistance to its damage.

feat_anc_spirit_shield.name: Spirit Shield
feat_anc_spirit_shield.description: If you are raging and a creature within 30 feet takes damage, you can use your reaction to reduce that damage.

feat_anc_consult_spirits.name: Consult the Spirits
feat_anc_consult_spirits.description: You can cast Augury or Clairvoyance without spell slots or material components using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability.

feat_anc_vengeful_ancestors.name: Vengeful Ancestors
feat_anc_vengeful_ancestors.description: When you use Spirit Shield to reduce damage, the attacker takes force damage equal to the amount prevented.

classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a battle rage.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d12 (or 7) + your Constitution modifier per Barbarian level after 1st

proficiencies_desc.skills: Choose two from Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, or Survival

classes.starting_equipment:
Choose between:
(a) hide armor, (b) leather armor, or (c) 10 gc
(a) two handaxes or (b) martial weapon (below 30gc)
(a) battleaxe or (b) any two simple melee weapons
(a) explorer’s pack or (b) 4 javelins and a quiver
classes.quick_build: Put your highest score in Strength, followed by Constitution. Choose the Outlander background.
classes.multiclassing: Ability Score Minimum: Strength 13. Proficiencies gained: Shields, Simple and Martial weapons.

subclasses.name: Path of the Ancestral Guardian
subclasses.description: Some barbarians hail from cultures that revere their ancestors. These spirits provide protection to the warrior and their kin.
